economic_notes: Nation has significant business interests including forestry (Chu Cho Forestry LLP), environmental services, outfitters, and trading post. Victoria Foundation Endowment Fund with initial capital of $16,065,948 held in perpetuity. Earnings from investment in Nation business entities of $6,324,388 in 2023.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Consolidated entity includes 6 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 10 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Total government transfers estimated as Province of BC ($9,742,993) + ISC ($7,609,285) + First Nations Health Authority ($4,968,248) + BC Treaty Commission ($550,000) + FNESC ($744,386) + BC Gaming ($611,138) = $24,226,050; OSR = total revenue minus government transfers. Long-term debt includes debt of $1,267,914 plus promissory note payable of $14,049,989. Annual debt service = promissory note repayment $646,085 + debt repayment $114,738. Victoria Foundation Endowment of $16,065,948 held in perpetuity NOT recorded on balance sheet. Accumulated surplus includes $209,690 in accumulated remeasurement gains from new PS 3450 adoption. Schedule of remuneration not included in provided text.
